fruitJuices.name: Mosambi Juice
fruitJuices.description: Fresh sweet lime juice, cold-pressed for a naturally refreshing and vitamin C-packed drink.

fruitJuices.name: Pine Apple Juice
fruitJuices.description: Tropical golden pineapple blended fresh — tangy, sweet and absolutely invigorating.

fruitJuices.name: Ganga Jamna (Mosambi+Pineapple)
fruitJuices.description: A royal blend of sweet lime and pineapple — our signature two-tone special.

fruitJuices.name: Mango Juice
fruitJuices.description: Pure Hyderabadi mango pulp blended fresh — thick, sweet and gloriously tropical.

fruitJuices.name: Pomegranate Juice
fruitJuices.description: Freshly pressed pomegranate — deep ruby red, antioxidant-rich and boldly flavoured.

fruitJuices.name: Watermelon Juice
fruitJuices.description: Chilled fresh watermelon blended smooth — the ultimate summer coolant.

fruitJuices.name: Grapes Juice
fruitJuices.description: Fresh grape juice — deep purple, naturally sweet and rich in antioxidants.

fruitJuices.name: Apple Juice
fruitJuices.description: Crisp fresh apple juice — golden, lightly sweet and wonderfully refreshing.

specialJuices.name: Fruit Punch Juice
specialJuices.description: A vibrant mix of seasonal fruits punched together for a burst of tropical flavour.

specialJuices.name: Dragon Fruit Juice
specialJuices.description: Striking pink dragon fruit blended into a visually stunning and nutritious drink.

specialJuices.name: Kiwi Blast
specialJuices.description: Tangy fresh kiwi blended with a hint of mint — zingy, green and absolutely refreshing.

specialJuices.name: Avocado Juice
specialJuices.description: Creamy fresh avocado blended with milk and honey — rich, velvety and supremely nutritious.

specialJuices.name: Jamun Juice
specialJuices.description: Fresh Indian blackberry juice — deep purple, tart and traditionally known for blood sugar benefits.

specialJuices.name: Spl. Fruit Mandi Juice
specialJuices.description: A grand celebration of seasonal fruits — our most elaborate special juice creation.

dryFruitJuices.name: Badam Juice
dryFruitJuices.description: Pure almond milk blended with saffron and cardamom — the classic Indian health drink.

dryFruitJuices.name: Anjeer Juice
dryFruitJuices.description: Soaked dried figs blended with milk — silky smooth, naturally sweet and iron-rich.

dryFruitJuices.name: Kaju Anjeer Juice
dryFruitJuices.description: Cashew and fig blended together with chilled milk — rich, nutty and decadent.

dryFruitJuices.name: Badam Anjeer Juice
dryFruitJuices.description: The best of both worlds — almonds and figs blended into a supremely nourishing drink.

dryFruitJuices.name: Pista Juice
dryFruitJuices.description: Premium pistachio milk with cardamom and rose water — luxuriously rich and aromatic.

dryFruitJuices.name: Jaku Juice
dryFruitJuices.description: A special energising dry fruit blend — thick, nourishing and bursting with natural goodness.

fruitSalads.name: Cut Fruit Bowl
fruitSalads.description: A generous bowl of freshly cut seasonal fruits — clean, light and naturally delicious.

fruitSalads.name: Malt Fruit Salad (Tin Fruits)
fruitSalads.description: Seasonal fruits with premium tinned fruits, malt powder and cream — a crowd favourite.

fruitSalads.name: Shaldud Malai Salad
fruitSalads.description: Premium mixed fruit salad topped with fresh malai cream — rich, indulgent and satisfying.

fruitSalads.name: Mango Malai
fruitSalads.description: Fresh mango chunks draped in thick malai cream — the summer salad of dreams.

fruitSalads.name: Yemeni Dry Fruit Salad
fruitSalads.description: An opulent mix of premium dry fruits with fresh fruits and cream — our most luxurious salad.

fruitSalads.name: Green Anjeer Malai
fruitSalads.description: Fresh green figs with rich malai cream — a unique, elegant and refreshing combination.

milkShakes.name: Strawberry Shake
milkShakes.description: Fresh strawberries blended with chilled milk and ice cream — vibrant, creamy and irresistible.

milkShakes.name: Chocolate Shake
milkShakes.description: Rich Belgian chocolate blended with creamy milk — thick, indulgent and utterly satisfying.

milkShakes.name: Mango Shake
milkShakes.description: Pure Alphonso mango purée blended with chilled milk — the king of summer shakes.

milkShakes.name: Blue Berry Shake
milkShakes.description: Antioxidant-rich blueberries swirled into a creamy shake — beautiful colour, incredible taste.

milkShakes.name: Badam Shake
milkShakes.description: Almond milk shake with saffron and cardamom — the classic Hyderabadi health indulgence.

milkShakes.name: Royal Special Shake
milkShakes.description: Our signature house shake — a secret blend of premium ingredients that keeps guests coming back.

milkShakes.name: Litchi Shake
milkShakes.description: Juicy lychee blended with cold milk and cream — fragrant, floral and absolutely delightful.

milkShakes.name: Mango Malai Shake
milkShakes.description: Thick mango shake swirled with fresh malai — indulgent, creamy and utterly irresistible.

summerSpecials.name: Falooda
summerSpecials.description: The royal Hyderabadi dessert drink — chilled vermicelli, rose syrup, sabja seeds and ice cream.

summerSpecials.name: Mango Lassi
summerSpecials.description: Thick Alphonso mango blended with fresh yoghurt — creamy, tangy and deeply satisfying.

summerSpecials.name: Lemon Soda (Sweet & Salty)
summerSpecials.description: Fizzy lemon soda with the perfect balance of sweet and salt — the great Hyderabadi classic.

summerSpecials.name: Abshola (Raw Mango)
summerSpecials.description: Traditional raw mango cooler with spices — the ultimate summer thirst-quencher from Hyderabad.

summerSpecials.name: Strawberry Lassi
summerSpecials.description: Fresh strawberry pulp blended with creamy yoghurt — vibrant pink and beautifully tangy.

summerSpecials.name: Chocolate Lassi
summerSpecials.description: Chocolate syrup swirled into thick chilled yoghurt — an indulgent twist on a classic.

punchShots.name: Royal Spl. Punch
punchShots.description: The crown jewel — our signature royal punch layered with exotic fruits and secret house mix.

punchShots.name: Alam Panah Punch
punchShots.description: A legendary punch inspired by Hyderabad's royal heritage — bold, complex and unforgettable.

punchShots.name: Mango Punch
punchShots.description: Fresh mango blended with tropical fruits into a vibrant, layered punch — pure summer joy.

punchShots.name: Pista Punch
punchShots.description: Premium pistachio punch — velvety, nutty and beautifully green with a fragrant finish.

punchShots.name: Custard Punch
punchShots.description: Smooth custard blended with seasonal fruits into a thick, dreamy and satisfying punch.

punchShots.name: Oreo Shots
punchShots.description: Chilled Oreo cookie shots — creamy, crunchy and absolutely addictive. A crowd pleaser!

snacks.name: Chicken Shawarma
snacks.description: Juicy spiced chicken rolled in rumali roti with garlic sauce — authentic Arabian street food.

snacks.name: Spl. Chicken Shawarma
snacks.description: Our premium version — extra chicken, extra sauce, extra everything. The real taste of Arabia.

snacks.name: Veg. Sandwich
snacks.description: Fresh vegetables layered in soft bread with chutney — light, simple and perfectly satisfying.

snacks.name: Veg. Grilled Sandwich
snacks.description: Grilled sandwich loaded with veggies and mozzarella cheese — crispy outside, melty inside.

snacks.name: Veg. Burger
snacks.description: Classic veggie burger with fresh toppings and creamy sauce — hearty and satisfying.

snacks.name: Chicken Pizza
snacks.description: Thin-crust pizza topped with spiced chicken, peppers, onions and stretchy mozzarella.
